descriptionHtml:
Lagoon 52F For Sale 2014 | 4 Guest Cabins + 2 Crew Cabins | Tax Paid

If you are looking to purchase a spacious sailing catamaran, the Lagoon 52F For Sale 2014 offers a practical balance of comfort and performance. Built in 2014 and maintained in good condition, this model is well suited for both private use and charter operations. She is designed to provide reliable sailing and comfortable living on board, with an arrangement and equipment that addresses many of the needs of modern sailors.

Specifications - Lagoon 52F For Sale 2014

  • Boat Type: Main sail – Battened
  • Year of Build: 2014
  • Length Overall (LOA): 12.85 m
  • Beam: 8.6 m
  • Draft: 1.5 m
  • Cabins: 4 double cabins (1 master, 3 VIP) + 2 single for crew
  • Heads: 4
  • Engines: Yanmar 2 x 75hp, 535 hours each
  • Generator: Onan 17.5kw, 2096 hours (serviced at 2080 hours)
  • Fuel Tank: 992 litres
  • Water Tank: 960 litres
  • Air Conditioning: Yes
  • Navigation: Full set of Raymarine instruments, plotter, GPS, autopilot
  • Steering Wheel(s): 1
  • Bimini: Fully customised
  • Deck Shower: Hot and cold
  • Electric Windlass: Yes
  • Electric Fridge: Yes
  • Sound System: TV, indoor & outdoor audio system (Bluetooth)
  • Dinghy with Outboard: Included

The Lagoon 52F For Sale 2014 delivers spacious accommodation and reliable sailing capabilities, making her a suitable choice for those seeking a catamaran in good condition. For further information or viewing details, please enquire.
